betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Voltaic Pile: Basic Energy Storage§f

§aThe Basic Voltaic Pile is your first nuclear-grade battery!§f
The §bBasic Voltaic Pile§f (`nuclearcraft:voltaic_pile_basic`, §bTileBattery.VoltaicPileBasic§f) is a §bstand-alone energy storage block§f — the smallest, earliest battery in the NuclearCraft tech line. It accepts and outputs FE (Forge Energy) on all six faces, making it a useful mid-tier power buffer.

§6Crafting Recipe (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:179)§f:
Per `addShapedOreRecipe(NCBlocks.voltaic_pile_basic, ...)`:
- Output: §b1 × Basic Voltaic Pile§f
- Pattern (3×3): §bP-S-P / S-M-S / P-S-P§f
  - §bP§f = §bBasic Plate§f (`plateBasic`)
  - §bS§f = §bCopper Solenoid§f (`solenoidCopper`)
  - §bM§f = §bMagnesium Block§f (`blockMagnesium`)

§6Alternative Recipe (graph: `steam_transformer`)§f:
The JEI graph also shows a §bSteam Transformer§f alternative:
- Input 1: §bMagnesium Ingot§f (`ingotMagnesium`)
- Input 2: §bCopper Solenoid§f
- Output: Voltaic Pile

§6Battery Function (TileBattery.java)§f:
- Per `TileBattery.VoltaicPileBasic` (line 34-39), the block is a §bTileBattery§f that extends the NC §bBattery§f class hierarchy.
- §bCapacity§f: defined per-tier in the §bBatteryBlockType.VOLTAIC_PILE_BASIC§f enum (line 350 in NCBlocks.java: `voltaic_pile_basic = ... new BlockBattery(BatteryBlockType.VOLTAIC_PILE_BASIC)`).
- §bTier§f: the lowest tier of NC batteries.
- §bCharge/discharge rate§f: standard FE rates, balanced for early-game.

§6Upgrades (graph)§f:
The Basic Voltaic Pile is a component in crafting upgrades to §bModular Machinery§f energy hatches:
- §bReinforced Energy Input/Output Hatch§f (tier 3)
- §bBig Energy Input/Output Hatch§f (tier 4)
- §bHuge Energy Input/Output Hatch§f (tier 5)

§6Other Voltaic Pile Tiers§f:
- §bAdvanced Voltaic Pile§f (`voltaic_pile_advanced`, line 180 in CraftingRecipeHandler.java: `addShapedEnergyRecipe` using `voltaic_pile_basic` + `plateAdvanced` + Magnesium + Copper)
- §bDepleted-Uranium Voltaic Pile§f (`voltaic_pile_du`, the DU version, even higher capacity)

§6Use in Power Systems§f:
- Buffer between a §bSteam Turbine§f and §bNC Fission Reactor§f power output
- Power source for §bNC machines§f during grid maintenance
- Portable power storage for base relocations

§eTip§f: Chain a few Voltaic Piles in series (one in, one out) to make a §bquick charging station§f for tools. The Basic Voltaic Pile is too low-capacity to power mid-game machines, but the §bAdvanced Voltaic Pile§f and §bLithium Ion Battery§f are excellent mid-game power storage options.
